seo.title: Frequently asked questions
seo.description: Answers to common SmartMall questions about shopping, payment, warranty, delivery, and customer support.

page.title: Frequently asked questions
page.description: Common questions about shopping, delivery, returns, and customer support.

items.question: How do I place an order?
items.answer: Choose a product, add it to your cart, enter your information, and confirm payment. Support is available through Zalo/hotline if needed.

items.question: How long do I have to return or exchange an item?
items.answer: The return and exchange window depends on each product. It is usually 7-30 days from the day you receive your order. See the return policy page for details.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery usually takes 1-3 days in inner-city areas and 3-7 days for other provinces or cities. Holidays may take longer.

items.question: How can I check my order status?
items.answer: Open "My orders" on the website, or contact the hotline/Zalo team for lookup support.

items.question: What should I do if a product is defective?
items.answer: Please contact support within 24 hours after receiving the item and send photos or a clip so we can handle the exchange or return quickly.

items.question: How is the shipping fee calculated?
items.answer: Shipping fees are calculated based on your area and the delivery partner.

items.question: What is the warranty policy?
items.answer: Depending on the product, warranty coverage ranges from 1 to 12 months. Check each product page or contact the shop for details.

items.question: Are there any promotions?
items.answer: We regularly update offers on the homepage banner and in the "Discount codes" section.

items.question: Do you support retail customers?
items.answer: Yes, we sell both wholesale and retail. Wholesale customers can contact us for the best quotation.

items.question: What are customer support hours?
items.answer: Support is available from 8:00 to 21:00 every day, including Saturday and Sunday. Messages sent after hours through Zalo/Inbox will be answered as soon as possible.

items.question: Where can I contact support?
items.answer: Call the hotline or message us on Zalo at {{phone}}. Fanpage and email support are also ready to help.
